title: Tacz40k
description: An addon of tacz filled with 40k weapons
body:
An adddon of tacz using hammercraft 40k models (im the same dev), this mod was made for the hammercraft 40k official server

Discord: https://discord.gg/X2XuwgmqUN

Hammercraft: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/wh40kmc-project

The mod adds various weapons for most 40k factions (and more coming)

If you find a bug please report it

IMPERIUM

Lasgun

Bolter

Heavy bolter

Bolter pistol

Heavy flamerthrower

Abvsolver bolter

Plasma pistol

Marine plasma pistol

Plasma culverin

Autogun

NECRON

Gauss rifle

Tachyon launcher

Tesla

CHAOS

Guitar bolter

Sonic blaster

And more to come
